description: A new Duration (ms) field with numeric comparison operators (>=, >, <=, <) is available in the trace detail filter dialog, letting you hide short-lived spans that add noise to large traces. Ancestor spans are preserved so the trace tree stays navigable, and the underlying trace query gained major performance improvements — a no-match duration filter on 10k spans now completes in ~67 µs instead of ~1 ms.
name: Minimum span duration filtering in trace detail
